Crush your enemies as a Bear. Tear them to pieces as a Werewolf. Incinerate them as a Wyvern.
The wrath of the earth is not easily stilled. The storming sky and fractured earth will not relent until your foes are dust.
The full might of the wilds is yours to command as you see fit. Wing and claw, fire and stone, root and vine — the choice is yours.
Druid1.flavour_text: There are many paths to achieve your goals... and you see them all.
Druid1.name: Oracle

Hit hard. Slam your mace on the ground. Crack the earth.
Stun your enemies. Push them back. Knock them to the ground.
Shrug off small hits with heavy armour. Block big attacks with your shield. Use your large life pool to absorb the rest.
Warrior3.flavour_text: You hunger for power, and by force of arms, you will take it.
Warrior3.name: Smith of Kitava

to_passive.name: Rupture the Flesh
stat_text: [Curse|Cursed] Enemies Killed by you, or by [Allies] in your [Presence], have a 33% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as [Physical] Damage

to_passive.name: Umbral Well
stat_text: Skeletal [Minion|Minions] you would create instead grant you [LichSkeletalBuff|Umbral Souls] for each [Minion] you would have created

to_passive.name: Unwilling Offering
stat_text: Your [Offering|Offerings] can target Enemies in [CullingStrike|Culling] range
Your [Offering|Offerings] affect you instead of your [Minion|Minions]
[Offering|Offerings] created by [CullingStrike|Culling] Enemies have 1% increased [BuffEffect|Effect] per [Power] of [CullingStrike|Culled] Enemy

to_passive.name: Steward of Kulemak
stat_text: Damaging [Spell|Spells] consume a [Charges|Power Charge] if able to trigger Abyssal Apparition

to_passive.name: Energy Shield if Consumed Power Charge
stat_text: 30% increased maximum [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] if you've consumed a [Charges|Power Charge] [Recently|Recently]
